title: Knicks' long-awaited NBA run electrifies NYC, with Trump set to attend key game
summary_full: The Knicks' stunning winning streak has energised the city as the New York basketball team prepares for the third game of the finals series at its home arena.
summary_public: The Knicks' stunning winning streak has energised the city as the New York basketball team prepares for the third game of the finals series at its home arena.
